Message: 請緊握扶手
Please hold the handrail
嚴禁飲食
No eating or drinking
入閘後及車廂內，嚴禁飲食
No eating or drinking in trains or paid area of stations
如感到不適，請落車並請職員協助
If you feel unwell, exit and ask for help from staff
請勿站近車門通道
Move away from door area
部份車門不會打開
Some doors will not open
部分幕門不會打開
Some Platform Screen Doors will not open
部份閘門不會打開
Some Automatic Platform Gates will not open
列車暫停服務，請所有乘客落車
End of train service. Please exit
本班列車暫停服務，請轉乘下一班車
Out of service. Change to next train
請盡量行入車廂中間
Move into the center of the train
前方列車尚未開出，本班列車稍為延遲，敬請原諒
We apologise for the delay
前方列車尚未開出，本班列車稍為延遲，敬請原諒
Train still in the next section of the track. We apologise for the delay
有乘客需要協助，本班列車將稍遲關出，敬請原諒
A passenger needs assistance. We apologise for the delay
有人誤闖路軌道，列車服務受阻，敬請原諒
Someone walking along the track. We apologise for the delay
信號故障，列車服務受阻，敬請原諒
Signalling fault. We apologise for the delay
架空電纜故障，列車服務受阻，敬請原諒
Power supply problem. We apologise for the delay
輕鐵服務稍為延遲
Light Rail service delay
